about:
Naomi Musi is The founder of the Fourth Industrial Revolution Group. This banner includes the 4IR Incubator, a business advisory organization, the 4IR College that offers ITC courses, the 4IR Drone Academy, Aviation Junction, and the 4IR Tech Fund.
 
The 4IR Group is committed to developing entrepreneurship, fostering growth through investments, and empowering the youth with essential technological skills. The group aims to provide opportunities through technology necessary for catalyzing economic prosperity while driving social transformation within our nation. In addition, Naomi Musi is the director of Uncloud Africa SA offering pioneering and ethically driven cloud solutions that ignite technological advancement, revolutionize industries, and pave the way for a brilliant digital future.
 
She is presently enrolled in the esteemed Global MBA in Digital Transformation program at Barcelona University. Naomi Musi is amember of Women In AI.
name: Naomi Musi
Dr. Oforkanji Emmanuel Onwodi
about:
Dr. Oforkanji Emmanuel Onwodi is an Infrastructure Expert, a chartered Logistics and Transport professional, a Maritime expert, an administrator, a senior public servant, and a highly skilled Public Private Partnership (PPP) Expert with solid experience in stakeholder management across both the Private and Public sectors. He is also a chartered Accountant with strong skills in project financing and structuring.

Dr. Onwodi has a clear understanding of project and risk management, effective resource allocation skills, and extensive experience in building and managing relationships with anchor industry players (International, Regional, National, and Sub-National), including corporate entities, project developers, public and private financial institutions, institutional investors, and related industry associations.

He successfully led the development of various critical infrastructure projects in sectors such as Transport, Roads, Health, Power, Logistics, and others. He has handled projects such as deep-sea ports, Federal Roads Rehabilitation (HDMI) for concessions, standard gauge rail development, and e-ticketing, among others. His involvement spanned from the project initiation stage to market sounding, the development stage, and the procurement stage. He led the procurement phase (RFQ and RFP) to a successful conclusion and took the lead in negotiations and due diligence on preferred bidders up to the commercial close.

Dr. Onwodi is an international public speaker and has been involved in capacity building at Ministries, Departments, and Agencies (MDAs). He is a strong public speaker in fields such as financing, PPP, and Risk Management, among others. In the private sector, Dr. Onwodi has vast knowledge in Mortgage Banking, Islamic Finance, Shipping, Freight Forwarding, and more.

Dr Onwodi is also associated with Escher Silverman Global, a Uk Firm with an office in Abuja, Nigeria. He handles all PPP infrastructure transactions advisory functions of the Firm and supports Business development Public sector stakeholder management and public sector engagement in the Firm.

Education and Certifications

  • B.A (Hons) International Accounting from Northampton University, UK
  • Post Graduate Diploma in Transport, Logistics, and Supply Chain Management
  • Post Graduate Professional Diploma in Accounting - Canada
  • M.Sc. in Risk Management from Birmingham City University, UK
  • Ph.D. in PPP Risk Management (Italy)
  • Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria
  • Fellow of the Chartered Institute of Logistics and Transport
  • Chartered Financial Consultant (CFC) - Institute of Financial Consultants, Canada
  • Chartered Management Consultant (Ch.MC) - Institute of Chartered Management Consultants, Canada
  • Chartered Forensic Accountant - Institute of Forensic Accountants, Canada
  • Chartered Manager - Chartered Management Institute, United Kingdom
  • Certified PPP Professional (CP3P) - Foundation Examination

name: Manpreet Singh
about:
A technology-oriented professional with 24 years of extensive experience in strategic planning, project management, and technical support. Proficient in resource management and troubleshooting, with a proven track record of driving business excellence through process improvement. Recognized for leading successful technical operations, enhancing customer satisfaction, and managing complex projects from inception to completion.
 
Core Competencies
• Strategic Planning & New Setups
• Project & Resource Management
• Vendor Evaluation & Management
• Troubleshooting & Resolution
• Key Account & Stakeholder Management
• Technical Support & Quality Assurance
• Customer Interaction & Negotiation
• Training & Development

name: Mr.Seyi Katola
about:
Seyi is an accomplished finance professional and prize winner – graduated in 1987, qualified as a Chartered Accountant shortly thereafter and became a Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria ICAN in 1999; Fellow, the Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria (CITN), Full Member of the Nigerian Institute of Management (MNIM); a Certified Forensic Accountant (CFA); a Certified Mediator (Neutral) and an Alumnus of the Institute of Public-Private Partnership, Washington DC.


Seyi had worked in various high profile firms and companies – Managing Partner, JHI-AO&A Chartered Accountants (an affiliate of JHI, USA). He was an Accountant of Lagos Chamber of Commerce & Industry; Financial Controller at Topbrass Aviation Limited; Head, Financial/Internal Control Division of Vigeo Group; General Manager, Finance of Vigilant Insurance Company Limited (now NEM Insurance Plc), Chief Financial Officer and later elected as Executive Director, Finance of Century Group.


He served as the Chairman, Accounting Technical Committee of the Nigerian Insurers Association, NIA (2002/3), Member of both the Annual General Meeting and Publication Committees of the Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria (CITN); Member, Steering Committees of the Nigerian Accounting Standard Board – NASB – now Financial Reporting Council (FRC), He was a facilitator at ICAN MCPE Programme (2001 – 2004) and still facilitates for ELAN, ICAN, and CITN. In 2017, Seyi was appointed the Coordinator for the newly birthed ICAN MCPE E-Learning Programme.


In February 2012, Seyi Katola was elected a Non-Executive Director, Century Bumi Limited, a Nigerian-Malaysian company. He has been the Chairman, Bratim Group (professional training institutions and business school), Abuja for over eighteen years.


In October 2018, Seyi was also seconded by SKC, to serve as the GMD/CEO of Universal Group, a business combo which operates in the Power, Real Estates, Tracking & Fleet Management and Oil & Gas Services subsectors of the Nigerian economy.


Seyi, in 2021, was appointed, by the Chief Judge of Lagos State, to the nine-man Governing Council of the Lagos Multi-Door Courthouse (LMDC), for the promotion of the court-connected Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR), the first in Africa. He is the current Chairman, Finance & Administration Committee and a Member of the Financing Committee of LMDC Governing Council.

name: Mr. Ladi Okuneye
about:
Ladi Okuneye is an executive with over 20 years of hands-on experience and a progressive track record in operations, business startup, consulting, project management, finance and marketing for Telecoms, Media and Technology companies in Africa, Europe and North America.


Mr. Okuneye has been engaged in numerous projects within the African telecommunications sector, including the turnaround of struggling operations, network transmission design and fibre roll-out, regulatory and market entry projects. He is a Subject Matter Expert on Satellite and Rural Connectivity Solutions.

name: Mr. Chuck Umeh, P.E.
about:
Chuck Umeh is a distinguished Professional Engineer and the visionary Founder and Managing Director of Belcorp Integrated Systems Limited in Nigeria and Bel Controls, LLC in the United States. Specializing in developing cutting-edge systems for the Oil, Gas, and Energy (ODE) industries, Chuck brings a wealth of experience and expertise to the field.


Chuck holds a Bachelor's Degree in Engineering Technology with an emphasis in Control Systems and a Master's in Microcomputer Systems, both earned at the University of Houston, USA. With over 25 years of professional experience, he is a seasoned expert in instrumentation and control systems, including Distributed Control Systems (DCS), Emergency Shutdown Systems (ESD), Fire and Gas Systems (FGS), and Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA).


Throughout his illustrious career, Chuck has navigated senior roles such as Lead Engineer, Research & Development Manager, and Projects General Manager. His leadership extends beyond borders, having successfully collaborated with diverse nationalities and regional capabilities, enriching his global perspective in the industry.


Currently, Chuck divides his professional efforts between the United States and Nigeria, where he has established a significant presence in the ODE sector. His commitment to professional excellence is underscored by his membership in the International Society of Automation, showcasing his dedication to staying at the forefront of industry advancements.


Chuck Umeh is not only a respected professional but also a family man. Married to Ify Umeh, they share the joy of raising three beautiful children – Beluchi, Ifunanya, and Lotanna. Chuck's legacy is not only evident in his professional achievements but also in the harmonious balance he strikes between his successful career and fulfilling family life.

name: Nandakishore Nair
about:
Nandakishore, popularly known as Nandan, has 37 years of impressive success stories in the Information Technology, Office Automation, and Consumer Electronics industries in East & Central African Markets, with year-after-year success in achieving revenue, profit, and business growth objectives within start-up, turnaround, and rapid change environments.


He is a passionate business leader with an excellent track record of managing overall P&L for business divisions. As a start-up specialist, he has immense success in launching businesses from scratch across the entire emerging markets of East & Central Africa. He has successfully transformed non-performing business units into top performers and amplified EBITDA margin by multi-folds.


Consistently producing higher-than-market revenue gains, Nandan has delivered multiple-digit growth of CAGR (Compound Annual Growth Rate), EBITDA, and Market Share year-over-year. He possesses extensive knowledge and understanding of diverse customer segments, markets, products, and services, varying across regions, cities, scales, and different formats of customers.


An accomplished, ambitious, and dedicated professional, Nandan has expertise in providing counseling, training and development, instruction, and consulting. He has gained sensitivity to cross-cultural dynamics through extensive travel across countries. A dynamic go-getter, pragmatic and focused, with excellent planning, leadership, and problem-solving skills, Nandan is a strategist and implementer with recognized proficiency in spearheading business to accomplish corporate plans and goals.


He has been associated with many industries, including Samsung Electronics East Africa Limited (as Regional Director – Information Technology, Consumer Electronics & Home Appliance Division), Crompton Greaves Ltd, PCS Industries Limited, HCL, among others.


Nandan is also a member of Lions Club International and has served as a Trustee and Chairman of the Kerala Association of Kenya. He also serves as a board member for various start-up organizations.
